mapper.update: update test_state set score = #{score},is_successful = #{isSuccessful} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ts.id, ts.test_status, ts.is_successful, ts.score, ts.error_type, ts.error_detail, ts.video_name, v.id as vehicle_id, v.vehicle_name, v.infotainment_software_version FROM test_state ts left join test_record tr on tr.id = ts.record_id left join vehicle v on tr.vehicle_id = v.id where ts.testcase_id = #{testcaseId}
select a.* FROM test_state a left JOIn test_record b ON a.record_id = b.id where b.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and a.testcase_id = #{caseId} and a.test_status = 1

SELECT c.vehicle_name, a.record_id, d.id case_id, d.testcase_content, a.is_successful, a.score, a.error_type, a.error_detail,a.other, a.test_status, a.case_type FROM `test_state` a, test_record b, vehicle c, test_case d WHERE a.record_id = b.id AND b.vehicle_id = c.id AND d.id = a.testcase_id AND d.scenario_id != 6 AND c.id = #{vehicleId}
